title: Medieval Menu
description: Adds a Medieval panorama and music to the menu
body:
Medieval Menu aims to recreate a spectacular medieval feeling in minecraft's menu.

It adds a deepslate brick texture to the buttons. Moreover it adds a custom panorama taken on MCME and replaces the original menu music by cinematic medieval/fantasy music. 

Splash texts are also changed to fit the theme.

 

 

Make sure to reload minecraft for all changes to take place.






<details>
<summary>Panorama Credits</summary>

The panorama was taken on the Minecraft Middle Earth server (MCME).

MCME is an Incredible build server which's goal is to recreate J. R. R. Tolkiens world in Minecraft.

Be sure to take a look at it 
you can join their Discord server https://discord.gg/mcmiddleearth

The server IP is: build.mcmiddleearth.com
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f92bc0071c0f1ac93d1e427230540851fecc67.png)

</details>
